payload.answer: This looks like a new preference/routine statement. Please choose how you’d like it handled.
repair_options: Add as a separate memory: you usually prefer to read technical papers in the morning before checking email.
Keep this as a temporary note only, without making it durable.
If there is an existing morning routine or reading preference memory, keep both rather than merging unless you confirm they should be combined.
